title: Motorgasm: a cinematic act of terrorism
overview: a nun sets out on a quest of bloody vengeance to kill the sadistic criminals responsible for her sister's death.

title: Los Hombres No Lloran
overview: When his abusive father is about to be taken off life support, Joaquin avoids the hospital and escapes with his best friend, while his wife Lucia urges him to go say goodbye. Joaquin must decide whether to face the past or keep running.

title: Study Hall
overview: A straight-a student, his nihilistic friend, a juvenile delinquent, a washed-up popular athlete and other various characters converge in this sprawling, comedic crime odyssey.  In development, title still working.

title: fly, little plane!
overview: A childhood dream of flight lingers into adulthood, reduced to a habit of watching planes pass overhead. As time moves on, wonder gives way to distance. Eventually, he looks away.

title: Prize
overview: A young rower is pushed beyond his limits by an ambitious new coxswain.

title: Sun in Lidia
overview: Lidia goes with her mother, Gina, to the beach house where they used to vacation during her childhood. What should have been an opportunity to relax by the sea, begins to reveal unresolved issues in their relationship.

title: The Man with the Bag
overview: After Santa’s magic bag is stolen, he turns to his naughty list to find Vance, a thief, to help him get it back. Along with his daughter, Santa, and a group of misfits, Vance will have to pull off the greatest heist of his life to save Christmas.

title: Asterix: The Kingdom of Nubia
overview: The irreductible Gauls are turned into harmless children after a rare youth elixir accidentally ends up into the magic potion. To find the antidote and save the village from the Romans attack, Asterix and Obelix embark on a crazy journey to the far away Kingdom of Nubia.

title: Violent Night 2
overview: The sequel to the 2022 film. Plot TBA.

title: Ghollak
overview: A man falls into begging unintentionally and enjoys it.

title: Chili Finger
overview: When a small town lawyer discovers a severed finger in her chili, she blackmails the restaurant for a cash payout in an effort to regain control over her mundane life. The situation quickly spirals out of control, and her life descends into chaos.

title: Photograph 51
overview: Inspired by the true story of Rosalind Franklin, the groundbreaking British scientist who first unveiled the hidden structure of DNA but whose legacy has been overshadowed.

title: Umka
overview: Live action adaptation of the soviet cartoon shorts Umka (1969) Umka ishchet druga (1970)

title: No One Cares
overview: A shy woman is unexpectedly cast in a local production of an original musical. Under the spell of the strong-willed and enigmatic director, she loses herself in the role and the high-stakes world of this community theater production.

title: Exchange
overview: A mother searching for her missing 18-year-old exchange student daughter in Canada. As she investigates, she discovers an eerie mystery surrounding the host family and is forced to confront forces that may have taken over her child's body.

title: Очень сказочные дела
overview: Everyone in the Far-Far-Away Kingdom is absolutely mad about the Three Heroes. Their battles are like rock concerts: they draw crowds of fans, merchandise is sold on every street corner, and every child dreams of looking like their idols. Among them is forty-year-old Emelya, a simple-minded and clumsy chap, who also happens to be president of the ‘Three Heroes’ fan club.  At the tsar’s banquet, whilst trying to get closer to his idols, Emelya accidentally foils the bogatyrs’ secret operation to capture Koschey Bedrosovich. Koschey disappears along with the tsar’s daughter. Now everyone despises Yelemelya: the people, the Tsar, his own fan club.

title: Tafers Code
overview: Tafers Code follows five teenagers at the T.A.F. language school in Itaquaquecetuba, guided by the charismatic Teacher Gilmar. Each episode explores the unique challenges and strengths of the students as they discover how learning English can transform their lives. With humor, emotion, and a touch of documentary style, the series culminates in a final project that inspires not only the characters but everyone to take the first step toward a brighter future through language learning.

title: Ranger
overview: Based on the novel by Aseem Arora.

title: Disney-Ideologie
overview: Fairy tales are never just fairy tales. They shape how we think about power, inequality, and society. This film reveals what lies behind the colorful facade.

title: Archaeologies of the future
overview: Can we imagine an archaeology of the future? An unearthing of objects that have not yet been used, a reconstruction of societies that have not yet come to dance. And yet, traces guide an erratic movement from which all our rhythms seem to draw. There is, within archaeology, a visceral drive to reconstruct myths that might serve us as shelters—against which to contrast forms of community, of everyday life, of living.

title: Anchorless
overview: During a trip to Brazil in 2022, Augusto (15), an introspective and dreamy young man, becomes enchanted by Antônio (16), a magnetic and unpredictable boy from Belém. Amid the heat of the World Cup and the waters reflecting a fleeting encounter, a fragile connection is born, stretching across distance when Augusto returns to Italy, turning desire into obsession. While Augusto loses himself in idealizations and the emptiness of delayed responses, Antônio continues his life between parties, friends, and fleeting loves. What begins as a promising romance crumbles under the weight of time, silence, and the things that were never said. As the years pass, Augusto is forced to face an inevitable truth: some loves do not belong to the future, they exist only in memory. An intimate and visceral portrait of love, loss, and growth, Anchorless delves into the fragility of first feelings and the pain of learning that not every story is destined to last.

title: The Magnificent Raiders of Dimension War One
overview: A collection of rogues must gather information on a mysterious extra-dimensional threat to the galaxy in the 43rd century, and prepare a defense while fending off the first wave of attacks from horrific beings.

title: Fire in the Pond
overview: A retelling of the events of 9th November 1974 when a group of teenagers saw an unidentified object flying over Salem Mountain.

title: Violette
overview: Violette Toussaint, a cemetery caretaker in a small town in Burgundy, is a unique observer and a compassionate listener. Her peaceful life is filled by conversations with quirky cemetery workers and the many visitors who share their stories of love, loss, and life. However, her routine is disrupted when a local police chief arrives at her door with an unusual request. As they grow closer, Violette comes to understand that the truth behind long-buried mysteries in her past must be uncovered if she wants to take another chance on life and, against all odds, love.

title: Big Polio
overview: Lost in his own head, a man goes to see a priest, who sends him to an enigmatic guru.

title: Doc Cineclube da Boca
overview: Between the end of one screening and the start of the next, the collective passion to maintain access to a film club collides with the ghosts of decaying cultural spaces.

title: Watkins Law
overview: A decade after Jallow's  sexual relationship with his teacher, Miss Watkins, they meet again and are forced to confront the past they never quite escaped.

title: Duped (The Jezbel Experience)
overview: Alexandria Wright meets Elijah Martinez and the demonic journey begins. Elijah Martinez finds himself ensnared in a romantic involvement with Alexandria Wright, an unfaithful Covert Narcissist. She convinces him they are soulmates and they take a vow before God for His blessing with the penalty of betrayal being death. After years pass, Alexandria forgets the vows and begins cheating behind Elijah's back. Just a week before Christmas, she abruptly betrays him. To his astonishment, she swiftly transitions to a new relationship, bringing with her the unsettling secret of transmitting an incurable sexually transmitted disease to her new partner. Then came Karma. Her victims arrive to spit on her dirty grave as her demise finally arrives.

title: Marrow
overview: Madison's hopeless lesbian crush on her straight and taken roommate takes a dark turn when she learns of an arcane recipe for a love potion - one that calls for her own bones.

title: Samo Lives
overview: A vibrant portrait of Jean-Michel Basquiat, the NYC artist who revolutionized 1980s art. From street graffiti to gallery stardom, his bold Neo-expressionist works left an indelible mark on the art world and beyond.

title: Mother's Home
overview: On Christmas Eve, a teenager has an orgasm while dreaming of his mother. The next day, he has to face her with this idea in mind.

title: A Penny Weighs More Than a Soul
overview: "A Penny Weighs More Than a Soul" is a powerful documentary by Tobias Demetz (TD Films) that takes viewers deep into the untouched nature of the Dolomites. The story centers on the extraordinary life of Ulrich Senoner, who lives far from modern civilization at the secluded Malga Futura. Without electricity or running water, he embodies a nearly forgotten human resilience. This film is a visual tribute to the silent strength of a man who chooses the wilderness over comfort, showcasing the fragile balance between Alpine tradition and a rapidly changing world.

title: Playing War
overview: In war, people's lives are at stake; in this world, people are the object of a child's whim, which can lead many to break their worldview... literally.

title: A Man at the End of the World
overview: In a dystopian version of 2009, cargo delivery specialist Cole Dawson is forced into a covert operation, where he uncovers a horrifying secret with the potential to send what’s left of mankind into extinction.

title: Avengers: Doomsday
overview: Beloved heroes from three distinct universes are set on a deadly collision course and face an existential threat unlike anything they've ever encountered.

title: Love Is a Gypsy Child: A Carmen Story
overview: Andalusia, Spain, 1840. After three years of wandering, Salva, who works as an assistant to a blind knife sharpener, returns to Seville, his hometown, where he meets Carmen, a gypsy woman with a captivating voice.

title: Memoona and Sheralam
overview: Set in a 1900s Pashtun village, this tragic short film follows the lives of Sher Alam and Memoona, whose marriage is rooted in a long-standing childhood promise. While their life begins with quiet affection, the peace is shattered by the poison of jealousy and local rumors.  When an innocent interaction is twisted into a scandal by a resentful friend, Sher Alam is consumed by suspicion and the crushing pressure of social "honor". His inability to trust leads to a final, devastating decision that destroys their lives and leaves a haunting legacy in the mountains

title: Dune: Part Three
overview: As Emperor, Paul Atreides grapples with the consequences of his rise to power as political conspiracies and a galaxy-spanning holy war threaten the future he alone can foresee.

title: Winter in Prostokvashino
overview: Sequel to feature film adaptation of "Prostokvashino" by K.B.A.

title: Три кота. Вокруг света
overview: Continuation of the adventures of Korzhik, Karamelka and Kompot.

title: The Queen of Heaven
overview: The life of the Virgin Mary from the Crucifixion (33AD) till her miraculous departure/death (44AD). It also describes the early years of the Christian Church community.

title: Order of the Dragon
overview: In a world teetering on chaos, elite assassin John Rico is the go-to solution when the government wants threats removed-quietly and permanently. But when a mission goes sideways, he's given one last shot at redemption: track down and eliminate Mason Ryker, the final ghost of the feared underground unit known as The Order of the Dragon. As Rico's mission leads him to a small, danger-ridden town in Serbia, the lines between good and evil begin to blur. Is Ryker the monster he's made out to be, or is there a deeper conspiracy at play? What begins as a black-and-white hit spirals into a moral storm-and time is running out.

title: Faceless: Retribution
overview: After the devastating effects of Beast: The Omen, the world is in ruin. The Magician has just collected the pillars of power and harnessed them to kill half of all life, leaving Josh, Roonald, and The Beast stranded in the cursed forest. Those who remain of the MHHM characters band together in hopes of defeating The Magician once and for all, no matter what sacrifices must be made.

title: Prodigal Son
overview: Aaron "Amadeus" Overlake is a visionary filmmaker revered for his genius but plagued by his own demons—a volatile alcoholic whose life is consumed by anger, controversy, and from a bitter heartbreak. As tabloids revel in his self-destruction, Aaron’s only anchor is his best friend, Santiago "Baron" Gonzalez, a charismatic actor fresh out of rehab, fighting to rebuild his career.  Bound by shared struggles and a tangled history, Aaron and Santiago navigate the toxic undercurrents of fame and friendship. As Aaron embarks on his next masterpiece, his chaotic life threatens to destroy everything he holds dear.

title: Without a Trace
overview: A criminal on the run attempts to break into a house for hiding. He realizes his escape will be far more difficult than originally planned.

title: Ex Situ
overview: A paleontologist obsessed with making a historic discovery illegally returns to excavate a unique fossil, but her ambition drives her to sacrifice everything.

title: Taste of Ambrosia
overview: A tale of six students rising up against the tyranny of the Gods and the sacrifices made along the way.

title: The Tallyman
overview: Up and coming vigilante, the Tallyman, faces his biggest threat yet when he comes across a larger than life figure.

title: Sigma Males
overview: Two self-proclaimed "sigma males" go on the run for one wild night after doing an unspeakable act they can never come back from.

title: One Dying Star
overview: A fascinating story of science-fiction films that tried to predict the future of a socialist country that didn’t live long enough to see it.

title: AMER D'I
overview: Isaiah is a young man who decides to leave his family and friends to live and wander the streets of Paris after a painful past event.  Amidst encounters, ghosts, drugs, and self-destruction, Iz will plunge headlong into the capital.

title: Classified
overview: "I can’t put words to you, I can’t put labels to you; but what I can put are a whole ton of emotions and feelings to you, and even then I can’t put words to those."

title: The Angry Birds Movie 3
overview: The third installment in The Angry Birds Movie franchise. Plot TBA

title: Kumaari
overview: An upcoming thriller.

title: Best Of Joy: Chapter 2 - History
overview: Michael Jackson, now a world-saving hero and musical icon, finds himself adrift after the chaos of the Spotlight Seven. Haunted by fame and fractured family ties, Michael embarks on a personal journey to reunite the Jackson Five—his brothers, his roots, and the harmony he lost. But the path to healing is far from simple. As old tensions resurface and new wounds emerge, Michael must navigate the complex legacy of his past while staying true to the joy that first ignited his voice.  Set against the backdrop of forgotten towns and abandoned recording studios, Michael reconnects with each of his brothers in a heartfelt odyssey across America. With Brad and Samantha by his side, and Goku occasionally crashing in with unsolicited wisdom, Michael learns that sometimes saving the world starts with saving your family.  Stripped of supervillains and secret councils, Michael discovers that history isn’t just what you’ve lived through—it’s what you choose to remember, reclaim, and rewrite in song.

title: King
overview: Mentor and disciple embark on a perilous journey, pushing their survival skills to the limit against overwhelming odds and unforgiving environments.

title: The Riders
overview: Scully, an Australian man traverses Europe, alongside his young daughter Billie, in search of the wife that abandoned them.

title: Family Squad
overview: A case of mistaken identity lands solitary gas attendant Serhii in heaven. To earn his way back, he's tasked with locating an individual whose life he can positively impact, spurring his pursuit to reconnect with the father he never met.

title: Riam Fighting Angel 2
overview: Plot TBA.

title: The Beachnickers 3
overview: New film in the franchise "The Beachnickers".

title: Nick and the Jade Tree
overview: Nick is a caterpillar boy who, having overcome the taboo of the swamp, becomes a butterfly and, regardless of difficulties, strives for his dream - the Magic jade tree, where all the most beautiful butterflies of the world live. Dangerous trials, fun adventures, new friends and, of course, first love await Nick on his way.

title: Who Killed Artur Falcão?
overview: On a Christmas Eve that quickly spirals out of control, a group of friends finds themselves embroiled in an unlikely mystery that no one quite knows how to solve. Amid absurd suspicions, embarrassing revelations, and an investigation as improvised as it is chaotic, Christmas Eve dinner transforms into a game of accusations where everyone seems to have something to hide.

title: The Christmas Rescue: A Big Movie
overview: When Christmas is suddenly put in danger, Elmo and his friends must jump into action and race against time to save the holiday. With the North Pole's systems failing and chaos spreading across the city, the team embarks on a fast-paced rescue mission filled with wild obstacles, unexpected challenges, and nonstop holiday excitement. As the clock ticks down, they discover that only teamwork, quick thinking, and courage can stop Christmas from disappearing forever.

title: Los Vaqueros
overview: In the early 1990s in West Texas, three ambitious young men begin their ascent to notoriety within their small town crime organization as they navigate the treacherous underworld of drugs, gambling, and illicit deals. Their rise to power brings both wealth and danger, testing their bonds and morality in a world where trust is fragile and betrayal is commonplace.

title: The Trip
overview: a two guys travel on a train for something they searching for

title: Werwulf
overview: In medieval Britain, a mysterious creature lurks in the misty landscape, bringing ancient legends to life and transforming them into a terrifying reality, forcing the villagers to confront an ancient, supernatural threat.

title: Someone Dies Tonight
overview: A group of friends sets out on a holiday road trip to Greece. On their way south, they are intercepted by a group of Croatian gangsters. Locked in a remote house, they find themselves struggling for their lives.

title: Everything Else Is Noise
overview: Rosa, a contemporary music composer, agrees to give her first television interview at her colleague Tere’s apartment to keep it secret from her husband. What begins as a simple professional conversation turns into an absurd and comic portrait of rivalries and affections among three women—Rosa, Tere, and Tere’s daughter Luisa—interrupted by power outages, a constantly barking dog, and the visit of a famous composer. As the interview unravels, family and artistic tensions surface, revealing, with humor, both the fragility of prestige and the strength of complicity.

title: A Place in Hell
overview: A top criminal defense attorney, known for representing unlikeable clients in high-profile cases, is a relentless workhorse at her firm and fully expects to be named partner. When another attorney joins the firm, her job is put to the test and makes her question just how far she’ll go to protect it.

title: For Better And For Worse
overview: A group of friends, and the power of memory.

title: Hösten med Göran
overview: The film follows the narcissist and divorced father Göran as he tries to balance his life between having children, an expensive ADHD diagnosis and the search for love. At the same time, his best friend Alex struggles with a failing marriage. Together, they try to find joy in life, hope and maybe even love.

title: Mr. Irrelevant: The John Tuggle Story
overview: The true story of John Tuggle, who was given the title after being the last pick of the last round of the 1983 NFL draft.

title: Mayamrigaya
overview: The film is based on Rabindranath Tagore's novel Dui Bon which was first published in 1933 and is among one of Tagore's last three works.

title: SUKIYAKI 上を向いて歩こう
overview: The story centers around the life and friendship of the 689 Trio (songwriter Nakamura Hachidai, lyricist Ei Rokusuke and singer Sakamoto Kyu).

title: BYE BYE LOVE 探偵はBARにいる
overview: In a changing Sapporo, a detective and his eccentric partner continue solving cases while struggling to adapt to a modernizing world.

title: Classy Clown
overview: In the mid 2010s, two best friends ran a vlogging YouTube channel while they were in high school. In 2026, a deranged fan dresses as their fictional clown mascot and kidnaps the two friends to try and convince them to make just one more vlog.

title: Tonic 2
overview: Upcoming Dev Entertainment Film

title: Untitled Doctor Who Christmas Special
overview: Plot TBA.

title: Red Flag Bhalobasha Beshi
overview: Dibyojyoti Dutta stars opposite Divyani Mondal.

title: Flying Bee
overview: “Abeja Voladora” follows Ramona, a woman who begins working as a reporter at a major newspaper. After being sexually assaulted by her boss, she sets out to seek revenge, committing crimes that start drawing the attention of detective Benjamín Flores. As Benjamín investigates the cases, he unexpectedly begins to fall in love with Ramona, unaware that she is the one behind the violent acts.

title: 'Tis the Season
overview: Two wealthy children hold a washed-up mall Santa hostage as their Christmas Eve spirals into chaos.

title: The Daily Blues
overview: Many Men have it rough but struggling Guitarist Odie Freeman is the definition of the daily blues

title: Some Other Story
overview: Upon moving back to her hometown, a nostalgic Noelle reunites with her childhood flame Matthew to relive their final date before leaving their lingering feelings in the past. But will they be able to?

title: The Chosen One
overview: When Peter’s contract lands in the bin, his mind soon follows. A darkly absurd descent into office paranoia, ambition, and avocado toast.

title: ViQueens
overview: Fearless Viking girls Ingrid and Hedvig defy tradition to return a stowaway boy to China. Their journey spans icy fjords, Byzantine intrigue, and the fabled Silk Road, blending Viking grit with ancient Chinese wisdom, unexpected alliances, and a touch of magic.

title: Fireworks Over Yonder
overview: When a young man named Henry wakes up from a coma on New Year's Eve 1999, he discovers that the world has changed drastically while he slept. People are no longer allowed to set foot on his city's beaches, and every night unnatural lights streak through the sky towards a destination unknown.

title: Maybe We Were Fire
overview: Danny and Eve -- two high school sweethearts who tied the knot just shy at 18, suddenly find themselves at a crossroads when they suddenly separate 10 years later. Now, the once inspeparable couple must navigate a life without each other while their friends, family, and acquaintances are all caught in the middle. Flashbacks detailing their relationship follow.

title: The Audition
overview: A struggling actor, Nikhil Dagga , 31 stands at the brink of surrender. Broke and beaten down, he retreats to a claustrophobic Mumbai apartment where intrusive neighbors and mounting debts test his resolve. When his final chance at redemption collapses, one desperate, late-night performance becomes an unexpected act of rebellion.

title: By the End of the Day
overview: 20-year-old Lena runs away from a family that makes her unhappy and meets Stefan, who is two years older, with whom she shares her desire to be accepted and free. During one night, they join demonstrations marked by unstoppable popular discontent.

title: Apophis 2029
overview: On April 13, 2029, the asteroid Apophis will pass close enough to Earth, it will be below our satellites. It will dip below and pop back out.

title: Logan
overview: In development.

title: Narayan Pustika 2 - Endless
overview: This movie is the second part of the Narayana Pustika trilogy. In which there is a description of the troubles arising from the opening of the unimaginable door revealed by the great sages.

title: Confessions of a Brazilian Call Girl 2
The Waiting Man
overview: In 2022, the famous streaming group TOMNI was at the height of its popularity with over 7 million followers. Over the course of a week, their content changed and then they suddenly vanished. This is the footage recovered from their social media, computers, and SD cards. Experts believe the footage shows the worldwide phenomenon known as Alikabiha, also called the Waiting Man.

title: The Face
overview: 17-year-old Joel, a recently recruited night guard, watches over a compound marked by cartel violence. When the darkness begins to whisper, he realizes some secrets never die.

title: The Knight of the Sorrowful Figure
overview: Don Quixote and Sancho Panza set forth on their quest in search of honor, chivalry, and legacy.

title: Down the Road Apiece
overview: A lonely ranch hand in rural West Texas decides to risk the only life he's ever known when he falls for a hard-pressed woman stranded in the nearby town. He makes up his mind to leave with her, but things don't quite work out as planned.

title: Cop This
overview: It's Grand Final Day and in a suburban police station about to be replaced by an AI 'Terminal', the two remaining cops (Nicolette Minster and Ray O'Leary) are tasked with babysitting a drug dealer for 24 hours.

title: 3xHelô
overview: A girl just broke up with her boyfriend and needs to talk.

title: For If Night Leaves Something Undone, the Day Undertakes to Complete It
overview: A found 16mm print of a short narrative film set in the American Civil War, along with Super 8 home movies of the filmmaker’s family in Iran during the Iran-Iraq War in the 1980s, are fused into a ghostly labyrinth. Made entirely on a JK Optical Printer, the film exhumes gestures, movements, conflicts, and forces in constant resurgence.

title: The Aching Echo
overview: Hải Vy, a 12th grade student losing faith in her passion for art, leaves her university choice blank under mounting pressure. In crisis, she falls into The Aching Echo, a surreal world of her own creation, where meeting her younger self rekindles her reason to create.

title: Marie-Rose and the Mysterious Journey
overview: Marie-Rose and the Mysterious Journey is an animated 3D feature film based on the iconic show of Chantal Goya.

title: Hippo Love
overview: Two strangers meet at a Greek-Finnish wedding while going through their own breakups. Touko, a musician who has had little success and is still married, feels attracted to Eevis, who is in the process of getting divorced. Touko's wife, the famous singer Leena, is also a guest at the wedding and notices the attraction between Touko and Eevis. Amidst the stunning Greek seascapes, the conversations that take place over the course of one evening touch on parenthood, childlessness, sex, divorce, marriage, and, of course, love, while the guests celebrate a memorable wedding.

title: Wraith
overview: A psychological horror in which a man named Mark wanders a dark, deserted hospital looking for his supposedly dead wife, whose spirit continues to call out to him beyond the halls…

At 8:38 PM, May wakes up in a room with no memory. With one lifeline call, she must uncover the truth, before it’s too late. But is the voice helping her… or hiding something darker? 8 minutes is all she has.

title: Roots
overview: A black teenager falsifies a paternity test in hopes of convincing his white adoptive family he's their biological son.

title: The Tennis Menace Two
overview: When her father dies after challenging a divine being called "The Tennis God" to a table tennis match, Kat finally gets the chance to prove to everyone that she's the best. All she has to do is beat The Tennis God. How hard can it be?

title: Not All Men
overview: After breaking free from a long, toxic relationship, Fernanda embarks on a weekend getaway with three friends, seeking solace and distraction. However, what begins as an escape quickly devolves into a whirlwind of tension and hidden agendas, as the group's true intentions come to light, forcing Fernanda to confront the reality she sought to escape.

title: High Season
overview: Plot TBA.

title: Wings
overview: A student on a field trip imagines himself as a classic pilot to work up the courage to talk to his crush.

title: The Inviting
overview: The man who turned the girl into an obsession from the first glance has mastered every detail of her life. And now, he is ready to reveal himself.

title: TFQWOG: The Movie
overview: Two likely brothers saving the world from the biggest dangers of their lives before their fantastically quirky world will be destroyed.

title: Shush, Now
overview: A seven year old girl discovers her mum is having an affair.

title: Deathsman
overview: Percy Thompson (a Relocator for the Time Investigation Corporation) finds more than he bargained for when searching for his target.

title: Now Playing
overview: After mocking the movie theatre experience, Logan finds himself trapped in a cinematic nightmare. Haunted by vengeful spirits, he must escape the theatre before credits – and heads – roll.

title: Untitled Coming of Age Film
overview: Plot unknown.

title: El mágico cerebro de un hombre atormentado
Everyone's Here
overview: Cris decides to attend a birthday pre-game thrown by some old college friends. When the night doesn't go according to plan, Cris must resort to their own devices to get back home without a mode of transportation.

title: Infinity Disclosed
overview: A look at how a russian scientist created a manual on how to construct a UFO.

title: Fuck Mr Flanagan
overview: A journey into the woods causes two stoners to question their friendship and purpose in life - while they try to avoid a devious figure named Mr Flanagan.

title: The Selling Stage
overview: At the end of a twenty-five-year career, LuFisto confronts the cost of chasing a dream that asked for everything and gave back less than promised.

title: UNTITLED DOCUMENTARY BY PIETRO XIMENES
overview: Pietro Ximenes, through an old Cyber-shot camera belonging to his mother, records his last year with Luiz, João Matheus, Yan, Daniel, Pedro, Arthur Mattos and Davi studying together

title: Malta mall
overview: Documentary on the Malta mall, located in Poznań, Greater Poland Voivodeship

title: A Dor e o Silêncio do Infinito
OSAKAQUEST
overview: A young girl nicknamed Osaka moves to the big city to try and start a new life. After not even a day living in her new home, she and a new friend set in motion a series of events that lead the two to being swept up in transpacific gang conflicts, a threat from the president, and the invention of time travel.

title: Shredded Cheese
overview: A mockumentary follows a young man whose uncontrollable addiction to shredded cheese begins to disrupt his daily life and worry the people around him.

title: Crazy Christmas
overview: The heroes face new challenges. Vasyl Seredyuk's ill-fated plan to reunite his family for Christmas sets off a series of adventures, including divorce and a new wild wedding. A continuation of "The Crazy Universe," which includes three films, "Crazy Wedding," and three seasons of the series "Crazy Neighbors."
